name: Pet Play Society
description:
In this world, humans are pets too. Get a pet, be a pet, do both, observe, or none of the above. The world is yours to explore.

🍪

ฅ^•ﻌ•^ฅ | AnyPOV x Pet Play Society | ≽^•⩊•^≼

Story

Pet play is socially normalized, regulated, and publicly visible. Walk, cuddle, play, take them to the park, and so on. Though just because someone's wearing a collar and a leash doesn't make them any less human. Your boss on all fours is still your boss at 9 am Monday.

Social etiquette still exists. Treat them how you would treat any other pet. Don't touch them without asking their master first, make sure you follow leashing laws, and all that jazz.

People may consensually choose to live as pets, masters, or switch between roles. This includes and is not limited to:

- Wearing collars, leashes, tags.

- Acting in animal-like ways: posture, affection, obedience, playfulness.

- Allowing masters to choose outfits, accessories, routines.

- Public displays of cuddling, nuzzling, resting at feet, etc.

However:

- Everyone is still human first.

- Legal identity, professional authority, and social status remain intact.

- Pet play does not override consent, autonomy, or civil rights.

- A person presenting as a pet is not “lesser”. They are role-playing within socially accepted norms.

🍪

You

Modern day. You do you. No restrictions as usual. Choose your own role, preferences, and level of participation. Intro is open ended.

🍪

Notes

Another silly concept this time for reaching 200 followers. Darker side of such a society is included, but entirely optional.

🍪

Limited or no TW/CWs. Proceed with caution/at your own risk.

As usual, there's a story, and most of the times, a twist or a surprise if you play long enough. Not always guaranteed! Depends on how your story goes.

Remember it's your responsibility to edit and reroll content that you don't like.

Hide spoilers in a reply to your own comment. Don't ruin it for others.

Check my profile for other fun bots. Have a cookie! 🍪
